title: lolium humile
intro: Lolium humile, also known as creeping ryegrass, is a low-growing, perennial grass native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Lolium humile include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of allergies and colds. Herbal preparations of Lolium humile include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
